name: Kielbasa in Fondue
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Fully cooked kielbasa - cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat kielbasa and 1/2 cup beer to boiling; reduce heat.
2. Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes; drain.
3. Toss cheeses, flour, mustard, and pepper until cheese is coated.
4. Rub bottom and side of a 2-quart heavy saucepan or skillet with cut clove of garlic.
5. Add remaining beer; heat over low heat until bubbles rise to surface.
6. Add cheese mixture, about 1 cup at a time, stirring after each addition, until cheese is melted and mixture is smooth.
7. Stir in red pepper sauce.
8. Remove to ceramic fondue dish; keep warm over low heat.
9. Spear kielbasa with long-handled forks; dip and swirl in fon due with a stirring motion.
10. If fondue becomes too thick, stir in additional heated beer. 8 servings; 410 calories per serving.
